helpCenter.title: Help Center
helpCenter.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about Cerka
helpCenter.searchPlaceholder: Search for help... (e.g., 'how to post a shift', 'price index')
helpCenter.noResults: No results found for your search.
helpCenter.cantFind: Can't find what you're looking for? Our support team is here to assist you.

faq.gw1q: How do I find and apply for shifts?
faq.gw1a: Go to the "Find Shifts" page from your dashboard. Browse available shifts by location, pay rate, or industry. Click on any shift to see full details, then click "Apply" to submit your application. Businesses will review applications and confirm workers.
faq.gw2q: How does the reliability score work?
faq.gw2a: Your reliability score is based on: showing up on time (40%), completing full shifts (30%), receiving positive ratings (20%), and response time (10%). Higher scores unlock better-paying shifts and priority consideration from businesses.
faq.gw3q: What happens if I need to cancel a confirmed shift?
faq.gw3a: Cancel at least 24 hours before the shift starts to avoid penalties. Go to "My Schedule", find the shift, and click "Cancel Shift". Late cancellations (less than 24 hours) will negatively impact your reliability score.
faq.gw4q: How do I clock in and out of shifts?
faq.gw4a: On the shift start time, go to "My Schedule" and click "Clock In" on your active shift. The system records your start time. When finished, click "Clock Out". Your employer will review and approve the hours worked.
faq.gw5q: When and how do I get paid?
faq.gw5a: Payment terms are set by each business and shown in the shift details. Common arrangements include: end of shift, weekly, or bi-weekly. Payment is handled directly between you and the employer - Cerka is a marketplace platform, not an employer.
faq.gb1q: How do I post a shift?
faq.gb1a: Click "Post a Shift" from your dashboard. Fill in: job title, description, date/time, number of workers needed, pay rate, and location. Review and publish. Your shift will be visible to workers immediately.
faq.gb2q: How do I choose which workers to hire?
faq.gb2a: Review applications on the "Applications" page. Check each worker's profile, reliability score, past ratings, and work history. Click "Accept" to confirm workers. They'll receive a notification and the shift appears in their schedule.
faq.gb3q: Can I hire the same workers again?
faq.gb3a: Yes! Add workers to your "Favorites" list after a successful shift. When posting new shifts, you can invite your favorite workers directly, giving them priority access before the shift is publicly listed.
faq.mb1q: How do I find construction materials or other products?
faq.mb1a: Browse by sector (Construction, Agriculture, Electronics, etc.) from the Marketplace menu. Use filters for location, price range, and material type. Each listing shows supplier details, pricing, and availability.
faq.mb2q: How do I request a quote from a supplier?
faq.mb2a: On any listing, click "Request Quote". Specify quantity, delivery location, and timeline. The supplier receives your request and can respond with a custom quote. Track all quotes in "Quote History".
faq.mb3a: Yes! Click "Message Seller" on any listing. Use in-platform messaging to discuss specifications, delivery, payment terms, and negotiate pricing. All conversations are saved in your Messages.
faq.mb4q: How do I know if prices are fair?
faq.mb4a: Check the "Price Index" to see real-time market prices for materials across Rwanda. View median prices, price ranges, and trends. Compare supplier prices against market averages to ensure fair pricing.
faq.ms1q: How do I create a listing?
faq.ms1a: Go to "My Listings" and click "Create Listing". Select sector and material type, add photos, set pricing, specify location and delivery options. Include detailed descriptions to attract buyers. Publish when ready.
faq.ms2q: How do I respond to quote requests?
faq.ms2a: Check "Quote Requests" from your dashboard. Review buyer requirements, calculate pricing including delivery, and send your quote. Buyers can accept, negotiate, or decline. Fast responses improve your supplier rating.
faq.pi1q: What is the Rwanda Economic Price Index?
faq.pi1a: A real-time database of material prices across Rwanda, crowdsourced from suppliers and buyers. View median prices, price ranges, volatility, and trends for construction materials, agricultural products, and more.
faq.pi2q: How do I view price trends and charts?
faq.pi2a: Go to Materials > Price Trends. See professional charts showing 30-day price movements, volume trends, and volatility. Select specific materials to analyze. Export data to CSV for your own analysis.
faq.ap1q: How do I create an account?
faq.ap1a: Click "Register" and choose your role: Worker (find shifts), Business (post shifts), Supplier (sell materials), or Buyer (purchase materials). Fill in your details, verify your email, and complete your profile.
faq.ap2q: How do I upload a profile photo?
faq.ap2a: Go to your Profile page and click on the avatar placeholder. Upload a clear photo of yourself (for workers) or your business logo (for businesses/suppliers). Photos build trust and professionalism.
faq.pf1a: Cerka is currently free to use for all users. We may introduce optional premium features in the future, but core functionality (posting shifts, creating listings, browsing) will remain free.
faq.st1q: How do I report suspicious activity or fraud?
faq.st1a: Click "Report" on any listing, profile, or shift. Describe the issue and provide evidence if available. Our moderation team reviews all reports within 24 hours and takes appropriate action.
faq.ts1q: The platform isn't loading properly. What should I do?
faq.ts1a: Try these steps: 1) Refresh the page (Ctrl+R or Cmd+R), 2) Clear your browser cache, 3) Try a different browser (Chrome, Firefox, Safari), 4) Check your internet connection. If issues persist, contact support.
faq.ts2q: Can I use Cerka on my mobile phone?
faq.ts2a: Yes! Cerka is fully mobile-responsive. Open your mobile browser and go to the Cerka website. All features work on mobile, though some complex tasks (like creating detailed listings) may be easier on desktop.
faq.gb4q: How do I approve worker hours?
faq.gb4a: Go to "Time Approval" to see all clock-in/clock-out records. Review each worker's hours, make adjustments if needed, and approve. Approved hours are used for your payroll records.
faq.gb5q: What if a worker doesn't show up?
faq.gb5a: Mark them as "No Show" in the shift details. This impacts their reliability score. You can then quickly repost the shift or contact workers from your favorites list to fill the gap.
faq.mb5a: Verified suppliers have completed identity verification and business documentation review. Look for the blue checkmark badge. Verified status indicates legitimacy but doesn't guarantee quality - always check ratings and reviews.
faq.ms3q: How do I upload photos to my listings?
faq.ms3a: When creating or editing a listing, click "Upload Photos". You can add up to 5 photos per listing. Drag and drop images or click to browse. Good photos increase buyer interest and trust.
faq.ms4q: Should I submit prices to the Price Index?
faq.ms4a: Yes! Submit your actual selling prices to contribute to Rwanda's economic price data. Go to "Submit Price" under Materials. Your submissions help build market transparency and can attract buyers searching for specific materials.
faq.ms5q: How do I get verified as a supplier?
faq.ms5a: Go to "Verification" in your profile. Upload: National ID, business registration (if applicable), and proof of address. Admin reviews within 2-3 business days. Verified status increases buyer trust and listing visibility.
faq.pi3a: Automated alerts about significant market changes: price spikes, supply shortages, new suppliers, or unusual volatility. Check "Market Signals" to see current alerts and make informed buying or selling decisions.
faq.pi4q: How accurate is the price data?
faq.pi4a: Prices come from actual supplier listings and user submissions. Data quality badges show: number of sources, data freshness, and confidence level. More suppliers = more accurate prices. Check the "Data Quality" indicator on each material.
faq.pi5a: Yes! On the Price Trends page, click "Export CSV" to download current price data for all materials. Includes: material name, median price, price range, volatility, supplier count, and last updated date.
faq.ap3q: Can I have multiple roles on one account?
faq.ap3a: Not currently. Each account has one primary role. If you need multiple roles (e.g., both worker and supplier), create separate accounts with different email addresses.
faq.ap4q: How do I change my password?
faq.ap4a: Go to Profile > Settings. Click "Change Password", enter your current password and new password. For security, use a strong password with letters, numbers, and symbols.
faq.ap5q: What information is visible to others?
faq.ap5a: Workers: name, photo, reliability score, ratings, and work history. Businesses: company name, logo, and ratings. Suppliers: business name, location, verification status, and ratings. Contact details are private until you choose to share.
faq.pf2q: How do payments work between users?
faq.pf2a: Cerka is a marketplace platform - we connect buyers and sellers, workers and businesses. All payments are arranged directly between parties. We don't process payments or hold funds.
faq.pf3q: What payment methods can I accept as a business/supplier?
faq.pf3a: You decide! Common methods in Rwanda: Mobile Money (MTN, Airtel), bank transfer, or cash. Specify your accepted payment methods in shift details or listing descriptions.
faq.st2q: What should I do if someone asks me to pay outside the platform?
faq.st2a: Be cautious. While Cerka doesn't process payments, legitimate transactions should be discussed openly. Never send money to unverified users, especially for "deposits" or "registration fees". Report suspicious requests.
faq.st3a: Users can verify their identity by uploading National ID and business documents. Admins review and approve. Verified users get a blue checkmark badge. Always prefer working with verified users for added security.
faq.st4q: Can I see ratings and reviews before working with someone?
faq.st4a: Yes! Click on any user's profile to see their ratings, reviews from past transactions, and reliability score (for workers). Use this information to make informed decisions.
faq.ts3q: I forgot my password. How do I reset it?
faq.ts3a: On the login page, click "Forgot Password". Enter your email address. You'll receive a password reset link. Click the link and create a new password. The link expires after 1 hour.
faq.ts4q: How do I contact customer support?
faq.ts4a: Click "Help" in the menu, then "Contact Support". Fill out the form with your issue. Include screenshots if helpful. Our team responds within 24 hours on business days.
